description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CrossBuild that runs on push to master branch and tags starting with 'v', and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job strategy to build and test on multiple architectures (i686, aarch64, riscv64, powerpc, powerpc64, powerpc64le, s390x, sparc64, m68k, alpha) on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, installing cross-tools, and then building and testing with CMake and make.
